nasb.text: So the two of them made a covenant before the Lord; and David stayed at Horesh while Jonathan went to his house.

esv.text: And the two of them made a covenant before the Lord. David remained at Horesh, and Jonathan went home.

cnv.text: 於是他們二人在耶和華面前立了約。大衛仍住在何列斯，約拿單卻回自己的家去了。

ccb.text: 二人在耶和华面前立了约。之后，大卫仍留在何利沙，约拿单则回家去了。
